title: Shinobu
description: The mod pack "Shinobu" is an exciting tech-magic collection in an open-world format.
body:
# Mod Pack "Shinobu": An Exciting Tech-Magic Open-World Collection

## Why "Shinobu"?  
Our project is inspired by the Cristalix server's *Everyrage*, but we decided to move away from the skyblock system and unlock the full potential of mods in an open-world format.  
Additionally, you'll encounter an incredible questline featuring various mods, along with achievement quest branches as you progress through the pack.  

## Planned Features and Changes  
We’ve carefully designed world generation and structures to ensure the pack offers a stunning map, diverse biomes, loot chests, and plenty of exciting discoveries.  
We plan to add several new crafting recipes for machines, magical items, furniture, new weapons, and armor.  

## This is Just the Beginning!  
We’re actively working on the pack and already planning its server-based implementation. Yes, we’re optimizing the pack for low-end PCs and servers to make your experience even smoother.  
In the near future, our mod pack will include our own server, allowing you to play with others without needing to purchase your own host or configure the pack yourself!
